mapper.sql: ( ( (#{semester} IS NULL OR LENGTH(TRIM(#{semester})) = 0) AND cls.c_year = Date2EnrollYear(SYSDATE) AND cls.c_semester = Date2EnrollSemester(SYSDATE) ) OR ( #{semester} IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(#{semester})) > 0 AND TO_CHAR(cls.c_year) || '-' || TO_CHAR(cls.c_semester) = TRIM(#{semester}) ) )
mapper.select: SELECT l.no AS course_id, l.subject AS course_name, cls.c_no || '분반' AS division, l.credit AS credit, COALESCE(( SELECT LISTAGG( CASE ct.c_day WHEN 'MON' THEN '월' WHEN 'TUE' THEN '화' WHEN 'WED' THEN '수' WHEN 'THU' THEN '목' WHEN 'FRI' THEN '금' WHEN 'SAT' THEN '토' ELSE ct.c_day END || ' ' || ct.c_start || '-' || ct.c_end, ', ' ) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY ct.c_start, ct.c_day) FROM class_time ct WHERE ct.c_id = cls.c_id AND ct.c_no = cls.c_no ), '') AS schedule, COALESCE(cls.c_where, '') AS room, cls.c_max AS capacity, COALESCE(cls.c_now, 0) AS enrolled, ( SELECT ROUND(AVG(r.rating_overall), 1) FROM enroll e JOIN review r ON r.e_id = e.e_id WHERE e.c_id = cls.c_id AND e.c_no = cls.c_no AND e.e_year = cls.c_year AND e.e_semester = cls.c_semester AND e.e_status = 'ENROLLED' ) AS avg_satisfaction FROM user_account ua JOIN professor p ON p.p_id = ua.login_id JOIN class cls ON cls.p_id = p.p_id JOIN lecture l ON l.no = cls.c_id WHERE ua.user_id = #{userId} AND ua.role = 'PROFESSOR' AND cls.c_status != 'CANCELLED' AND AND ( #{keyword} IS NULL OR LENGTH(TRIM(#{keyword})) = 0 OR LOWER(l.subject) LIKE '%' || LOWER(TRIM(#{keyword})) || '%' OR LOWER(l.no) LIKE '%' || LOWER(TRIM(#{keyword})) || '%' ) ORDER BY l.subject, cls.c_no

SELECT ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_account ua JOIN professor p ON p.p_id = ua.login_id JOIN class cls ON cls.p_id = p.p_id WHERE ua.user_id = #{userId} AND ua.role = 'PROFESSOR' AND cls.c_status != 'CANCELLED' AND ) AS total_courses, ( SELECT COALESCE(SUM(cls.c_now), 0) FROM user_account ua JOIN professor p ON p.p_id = ua.login_id JOIN class cls ON cls.p_id = p.p_id WHERE ua.user_id = #{userId} AND ua.role = 'PROFESSOR' AND cls.c_status != 'CANCELLED' AND ) AS total_students, ( SELECT ROUND(AVG(r.rating_overall), 1) FROM user_account ua JOIN professor p ON p.p_id = ua.login_id JOIN class cls ON cls.p_id = p.p_id JOIN enroll e ON e.c_id = cls.c_id AND e.c_no = cls.c_no AND e.e_year = cls.c_year AND e.e_semester = cls.c_semester AND e.e_status = 'ENROLLED' JOIN review r ON r.e_id = e.e_id WHERE ua.user_id = #{userId} AND ua.role = 'PROFESSOR' AND cls.c_status != 'CANCELLED' AND ) AS avg_satisfaction FROM dual
